title: Sour Middle Eastern Tomato Crumble
description: A sweet and juicy dish with a tangy kick featuring pickles, cooked sous-vide to perfection for a low-sodium option.

ingredients.name: sour cream
ingredients.notes: Low-fat or plain, optional for extra tangy flavor

instructions: Place tomatoes in a sous-vide bag and seal. Cook at 85°C (185°F) for about 30 minutes.
In a bowl, mix sour cream with lemon juice, dill weed, oregano, and olive oil until well combined.
Drain the pickled carrots and cut them into thin slices. Add to the sous-vied tomatoes along with the sour cream mixture.
Toss everything together gently to ensure no clumps form. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve immediately or store in the fridge for up to 3 days.
